rollout.reason: This slice records billing evidence only and does not create ledgers, entitlements, invoices, payments, or charges.

capabilities.metricDefinition: Rank executions, contacts, messages, seats, storage, AI usage, and premium connectors as candidate billable metrics.
sourceEvidence: Product usage analytics and execution traces must prove measurable tenant-scoped usage.
capabilities.financeGate: Finance approves metric as billable and auditable.
capabilities.rollback: Do not expose billing metrics to customers.

capabilities.metricDefinition: Plan tiers map included usage, seats, connectors, and support level to named packages.
sourceEvidence: Customer segmentation and usage distribution are required before tier commitments.

capabilities.metricDefinition: Overage defines behavior when measured usage exceeds included plan quantity.
sourceEvidence: Billable metric and plan tiers must be accepted first.
capabilities.financeGate: Finance approves overage pricing and grace policy.
capabilities.legalGate: Legal approves notification and contract language.
capabilities.rollback: Disable overage enforcement and keep advisory notices internal.

capabilities.metricDefinition: Payment provider handles collection after invoice and entitlement requirements are accepted.
sourceEvidence: Provider choice depends on regions, invoice requirements, and finance system ownership.
capabilities.financeGate: Finance approves provider and reconciliation flow.
capabilities.legalGate: Legal approves payment terms and data processing.

capabilities.metricDefinition: Invoice drafts summarize tenant usage, plan, discounts, taxes, and adjustments before charge.
sourceEvidence: Usage ledger and finance review are required before invoice drafts are generated.
capabilities.financeGate: Finance approves invoice format and reconciliation.
capabilities.legalGate: Legal approves invoice terms and tax assumptions.

capabilities.metricDefinition: Renewal process combines account term, usage evidence, contract status, and owner review.
sourceEvidence: Account lifecycle and billing source of truth are not accepted.

capabilities.metricDefinition: Upgrade recommendations use usage thresholds and plan fit to suggest higher tiers.
sourceEvidence: Plan tiers and billable metrics must be accepted first.
